title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy, which demonstrates iterative self-improvement applied to software development. The video argues that while not universally applicable, AutoResearch offers a novel approach to improving software through self-directed iteration.
